emails.subject: RE: Citrix application?
emails.body: RE: Citrix application? I am still having trouble but I don't know if its and Enron problem or an Iroquois problem. I'm waiting to hear form Iroquois. I would like you to check it out if you have time this morning. To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Citrix application?
emails.body: RE: Citrix application? According to Iroq the problem is on our side. Please call me first think Monday morning at 3-4743. Following is the address that I'm starting at. I go to this address and click on "Customer Activities" and that's when I get the error message. It should ask me for my ID and password. I'm at ECS 04425 if you decide to come by my desk. I'm out for the rest of the day. Thanks <URL> To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Citrix application?
emails.body: looks like its working. Thanks To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Citrix application?
emails.body: I can't believe it. I'm having the same trouble again this month. I use this board about twice a month. To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Citrix application?
emails.body: thx, looks like its working. it probably already worked. i just forgot to use the icon you set up for me. i'll send you another nasty email next month. To: Germany, Chris
